intro.narration: Two glossy black crows drop from the sky and land on the road, eyeing you sharply.

outro.victory: The crows scatter into the sky. A single feather drifts down at your feet.
outro.defeat: The crows peck at you, then fly off cackling. You shake them off and walk on.
outro.escape: You duck off the road. The crows lose interest.

intro.narration: Two scruffy goblins leap out from between the cornstalks brandishing crooked sticks.

outro.victory: The goblins drop their sticks and tumble back into the corn, leaving a coin behind.
outro.defeat: They snatch a button from you and vanish, giggling.
outro.escape: You slip through the stalks. They never find you.

intro.narration: An old apple tree creaks, twists — and pulls its roots free of the earth. Its branches swing toward you like long arms.

outro.victory: The tree groans, settles its roots back into the soil, and lets a glowing acorn fall.
outro.defeat: The tree shoves you back onto the road and goes still.
outro.escape: You roll under the branches and back onto the path.

intro.narration: Snarls echo from the trees. A pack of grey wolves slips out, fanning around you.

outro.victory: The pack scatters. The Lion straightens up, tail high — he's proud of you.
outro.defeat: You stagger back. The wolves seem satisfied and slip away.
outro.escape: You break free and the wolves give up the chase.

intro.narration: Snarls echo from the trees. A pack of grey wolves slips out, fanning around you.

outro.victory: The pack scatters. The Tin Man dabs a tear from his cheek — proud and a little shaken.
outro.defeat: You stagger back. The wolves seem satisfied and slip away.
outro.escape: You break free and the wolves give up the chase.

intro.narration: A tiny wolf pup with oversized paws stumbles onto the path, whining. It's lost — and clearly afraid.

outro.victory: You kneel and let the pup sniff your hand. It licks your fingers, then trots back into the forest — but you swear it'll remember you.

intro.narration: You slip into a glowing crystal cave to shortcut the forest. Two dark spiders descend from above on silver threads.

outro.victory: The spiders retreat. The crystal walls hum — and a strand of silk catches on your sleeve.
outro.defeat: You stumble back out into the forest, brushing webs from your hair.
outro.escape: You squeeze back out the entrance. Better not to push your luck.

intro.narration: Halfway across the shallows, a mossy bog creature surges up from the water. Its huge sad eyes lock onto yours.

outro.victory: The creature sighs and sinks back into the water, leaving an iridescent pearl behind.
outro.defeat: It nudges you ashore and disappears beneath the lily pads.
outro.escape: You splash to the far bank and run.

intro.narration: A pale blue wisp drifts down through the poppies, beckoning silently.

outro.victory: You reach for the wisp — it brushes your palm and dissolves into a soft glow that you can carry with you.

intro.narration: Hundreds of tiny mice scurry into a circle around you, and a small Mouse King in a paper crown bows graciously.

outro.victory: The Mouse King presses a tiny silver whistle into your hand. 'Call when you need us, brave one!'

intro.narration: Around the corner, a stocky stone Hammerhead plants himself in your path. 'No passage,' he grunts.

outro.victory: The Hammerhead chuckles, flakes a chip of stone off his shoulder for you, and steps aside.
outro.defeat: He shoves you firmly back the way you came.
outro.escape: You sidestep and dash past while he blinks.

intro.narration: A single winged monkey peers down from a rafter, mischievous eyes glinting.

outro.victory: The monkey shrieks, drops a tail-feather, and flies off to tattle to the Witch.
outro.defeat: It snatches your hat and flies off, cackling.
outro.escape: You duck behind a beam and stay still until it leaves.

intro.narration: A whole flock of black wings rises from the slate hills — wheeling, diving toward you.

outro.victory: You wave your arms and shout. The flock breaks and scatters into the grey sky.
outro.defeat: They drive you to the ground until you cover your head; then they leave.
outro.escape: You sprint into a cave mouth and they overshoot.

intro.narration: A swarm of bats explodes from the rafters in a rush of leathery wings.

outro.victory: The swarm thins out and vanishes into the high beams.
outro.defeat: You duck low until they pass. A few feathers cling to your hair.
outro.escape: You sprint down the corridor and lose them.

intro.narration: The Wicked Witch towers before you, green fingers crackling with spite. There is no door back — only this fight.

outro.victory: The Witch's cackle turns to a shriek. She melts in a rush of black cloth and steam — and her broom clatters to your feet.
outro.defeat: She catches you in a green flash. The world spins — and Glinda's blessing pulls you back to the corridor for another try.
outro.escape: You slip past the Witch in the smoke, but you know you'll have to face her again.

intro.narration: On the way back, a single Kalidah — bear-bodied, tiger-faced — pads onto the path. Its huge amber eyes lock onto yours.

outro.victory: The Kalidah snorts, drops a single curved claw on the path, and disappears into the trees.
outro.defeat: It cuffs you off the path and lopes away.
outro.escape: You scramble up a slope and the Kalidah moves on.

intro.narration: The trees lean close. Tiny fireflies wink in a slow pattern through the gloom — left, right, right, left. The forest itself seems to be teaching you the safe path.

choices.label: Follow the fireflies' pattern
choices.outroNarration: You step exactly as the lights danced — and the brambles part to either side as if welcoming you onward.

onFail.outroNarration: You lose the rhythm. Brambles snag your sleeves and you stumble out the far side scratched but free.

choices.label: Push through the brambles
choices.outroNarration: Brute force it is. You break through scratched and tired, but the worst of the forest is behind you.

outro.victory: The forest thins and the air clears.

intro.narration: The river runs deep here, but a chain of mossy stepping stones rises and sinks with the rhythm of the current. Watch — the safe stones glow brighter, one by one.

choices.label: Memorise the safe stones
choices.outroNarration: You step exactly where the river told you. Cold spray on your face, but you reach the far bank dry-shoed and proud.

onFail.outroNarration: Your foot slips on a hidden stone. You splash through the shallows — soaked, shivering — but make it to the other side.

choices.label: Have the Tin Man chop a log into a bridge
choices.outroNarration: The Tin Man swings his axe in steady strokes. A sturdy log bridges the rushing water and the whole party walks across together.

choices.label: Wade through and risk it
choices.outroNarration: Cold water up to your knees — but you make it across, shivering and brave.

outro.victory: The far bank is solid under your feet.

intro.narration: Out on the empty plain after the balloon vanishes, a tiny entourage of field mice catches up — bearing one last gift.

outro.victory: The Mouse King hands you a coil of silver thread. 'For the road home,' he whispers, bowing.

intro.narration: (intro narration)

outro.victory: (victory line)
